title: calibrachoa linearis
intro: Calibrachoa linearis, also known as the Mexican sunflower or dwarf morning glory, is a species of flowering plant in the family Solanaceae. This plant is known for its bright orange, trumpet-shaped flowers and has been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments. The medicinal properties of Calibrachoa linearis include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been used to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures to promote health benefits like relieving congestion, soothing sore throats, and supporting immune function.
